---
title: "Real-World Data Applications"
description: "Empirical game theory with public historical data — trade, conflict, climate, health."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="real-world-data-applications"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Real-World Data Applications</h1>
  <p class="lead">Empirical game theory with public historical data — trade, conflict, climate, health.</p>
</div>
```
